name: Blobby Slime Quest
author: Poki
description: Blobby Slime Quest is a cute and bouncy platform adventure where you play as an adorable blobby slime! Jump over obstacles, collect shiny coins, and grab 3 hidden jigsaw pieces in every level. Discover fun power-ups along the way and use them wisely to reach the goal. Are you ready to squish, bounce, and puzzle your way through this slimy adventure? How to play Blobby Slime Quest? Walk: A/D or the right and left arrow keys Jump: W or the up arrow key or space bar Special powerups: S or the down arrow key Who created Blobby Slime Quest? Blobby Slime Quest is created by Entrevero Games. They have other amazing games on Poki: Vero Life - Dress Up & Decor , Kawaii Dress-Up , Fairy Dress-Up , Dungeons & Dress-Ups , Bearsus , Cozy Room Design , Full Metal Football , CombiMon , and Stick Fighter ! How can I play Blobby Slime Quest for free? You can play Blobby Slime Quest for free on Poki. Can I play Blobby Slime Quest on mobile devices and desktop? Blobby Slime Quest can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
